records.question: Which users with account ID exactly 1324757 have post history entries of type 1 or fewer created on or before 2014-08-14 02:02:33?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
WHERE users.accountid = 1324757 AND posthistory.posthistorytypeid <= 1 AND posthistory.creationdate <= '2014-08-14 02:02:33.0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Id
FROM users u
INNER JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
WHERE u.AccountId = 1324757
AND ph.PostHistoryTypeId <= 1
AND ph.CreationDate <= '2014-08-14 02:02:33'

records.question: Which users named mike1886 have post history comments exactly saying "added 104 characters in body" on posts that have at least 0 comments and are linked to parent posts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
JOIN posts ON posthistory.postid = posts.id
JOIN posts AS posts__1 ON posts.parentid = posts__1.id
WHERE posthistory.comment = 'added 104 characters in body' AND posts.commentcount >= 0 AND users.displayname = 'mike1886'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Id
FROM users u
JOIN postHistory ph ON u.Id = ph.UserId
JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'mike1886'
AND ph.Comment = 'added 104 characters in body'
AND p.CommentCount >= 0
AND p.ParentId IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which users named Tal Galili, with accountid at most 93886 and no more than 5 downvotes, whose websiteurl is exactly http://www.r-statistics.com and last accessed on 2014-09-02 14:18:16, have votes created on or before 2010-10-08 and comments made since 2010-09-28 21:09:48?

SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE users.accountid <= 93886 AND users.downvotes <= 5 AND users.websiteurl = 'http://www.r-statistics.com' AND users.lastaccessdate = '2014-09-02 14:18:16.0' AND votes.creationdate <= '2010-10-08' AND users.displayname = 'Tal Galili' AND comments.creationdate >= '2010-09-28 21:09:48.0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Id
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
LEFT JOIN comments c ON u.Id = c.UserId
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Tal Galili'
  AND u.AccountId <= 93886
  AND u.DownVotes <= 5
  AND u.WebsiteUrl = 'http://www.r-statistics.com'
  AND u.LastAccessDate = '2014-09-02 14:18:16'
  AND v.CreationDate <= '2010-10-08'
  AND c.CreationDate >= '2010-09-28 21:09:48'

records.question: Which users with exactly 224 upvotes have commented on any posts?

JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN posts ON comments.postid = posts.id
WHERE users.upvotes = 224
records.pred_sql:

FROM users u
WHERE u.UpVotes = 224

JOIN posts ON comments.postid = posts.id

)

WHERE users.reputation = 6792 AND users.displayname = 'Shane' AND posts.viewcount >= 1613.0 AND posts.tags = '<model-selection>' AND users.age >= 35.0 AND posts.answercount = 8.0 AND votes.votetypeid = 5
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Id
FROM users u
JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
JOIN posts p ON v.PostId = p.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Shane'
  AND u.Reputation = 6792
  AND u.Age >= 35
  AND v.VoteTypeId = 5
  AND p.ViewCount >= 1613
  AND p.AnswerCount = 8
  AND p.Tags LIKE '%<model-selection>%'

records.question: Which users named Allison have earned badges?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN badges ON users.id = badges.userid
WHERE users.displayname = 'Allison'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Id
FROM users u
INNER JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Allison'

records.question: Which users with an account ID of at least 13043 have the website URL http://www.contrib.andrew.cmu.edu/~amukherj/ and are connected to posts that have exactly 4 answers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
JOIN posts ON votes.postid = posts.id
WHERE users.websiteurl = 'http://www.contrib.andrew.cmu.edu/~amukherj/' AND posts.answercount = 4.0 AND users.accountid >= 13043
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Id
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE u.AccountId >= 13043
AND u.WebsiteUrl = 'http://www.contrib.andrew.cmu.edu/~amukherj/'
AND p.AnswerCount = 4
